name: Norman Broadbent plc
summary: Norman Broadbent plc, together with its subsidiaries, provides professional services in the United Kingdom and internationally. The company offers a portfolio of integrated leadership acquisition and advisory services, including board and leadership search, senior interim management, research and insight, leadership consulting and assessment, mezzanine level search, and coaching and talent management, as well as executive level talent solutions. Norman Broadbent plc was incorporated in 1936 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
